sourceTitle: Guidelines | AI Hub - StaffNet - The University of Manchester
evidenceSnippetOriginal: The University has adopted the following principles, building on existing frameworks for academic integrity and emerging guidance on AI. All staff and students using or developing AI are personally responsible for adhering to these.
